local_visual_result: Opening frames show the initial maritime/over-water subject matter with vessel/platform-like structure and redactions.
detector_summary: Detector marks some bright structure in the initial subject matter; not treated as UAP track.

dvids_anchor: DVIDS: 00:05 area of contrast briefly enters from left side
local_visual_result: Local frame shows a brief contrast point/feature near the left-side field while initial subject matter is still present.
detector_summary: 1 fps detector active, but this is a single-second event in cluttered context.

dvids_anchor: DVIDS: 00:06-00:18 sensor pans away from initial subject matter while cycling contrast and zoom
local_visual_result: Local frames show clear sensor panning and contrast/modality changes; scene becomes lower-context and darker/blanker in places.
detector_summary: Detector has scattered early active windows, mostly not stable enough for a track.
judgment: sequence alignment high; object track low

dvids_anchor: DVIDS: 00:19 area of contrast re-enters near center/top edge; 00:20 starts generally in-FOV interval
local_visual_result: Local frames show low-context sensor field; the object is difficult to distinguish visually at one-fps review.
detector_summary: Detector weak/noisy, with only isolated medium activity at 24s.

local_visual_result: Local frames show intermittent small bright points against water-like texture, but no clean one-second continuous track.
detector_summary: Detector produces mostly weak candidates with scattered medium/strong one-second detections.

local_visual_result: Small bright object/area of contrast remains visible against water texture; movement relative to reticle/sensor field is trackable in the derived sheets.
detector_summary: 1 fps: 26 samples, 24 strong and 2 medium. 5 fps: 126 samples, 116 strong, 8 medium, 2 weak. Manual validation accepted all 26 one-fps points, 22 high-quality and 4 medium-quality.
judgment: strongest manually validated quantitative anchor interval

dvids_anchor: DVIDS: 01:16 sensor narrows field of view to zoom in on area of contrast
local_visual_result: Local frames show zoomed water texture and a continuing compact bright candidate, but visual clutter increases.
detector_summary: 1 fps: 12 samples, all strong. 5 fps: 56 samples, 54 strong, 2 weak. Manual validation accepted all 12 one-fps points, 9 high-quality and 3 medium-quality.
judgment: manually validated continuation; use with zoom/texture caveat

dvids_anchor: Between DVIDS 01:16 zoom and 01:56 further zoom
local_visual_result: Local frames show more water texture and multiple candidate highlights; detector boxes jump more than in the primary interval.
detector_summary: 1 fps: 18 samples, 13 strong, 4 weak. 5 fps: 86 samples, 64 strong, 2 medium, 20 weak.
judgment: supports continued contrast in field, but weak for manual position track

dvids_anchor: DVIDS: 01:56 sensor further narrows field of view to zoom in
local_visual_result: Local frames show enlarged water texture and intermittent bright candidates; larger texture makes false-positive risk higher.
detector_summary: 1 fps: 12 samples, 6 strong and 6 medium. 5 fps: 56 samples, 43 strong, 9 medium, 3 weak.
judgment: sequence alignment high; object-position confidence medium-low

dvids_anchor: DVIDS: 02:10 blue reticle briefly appears but does not acquire lock
local_visual_result: Local frames show cyan/blue reticle-style symbology and continued field texture; target candidate is not cleanly locked.
detector_summary: 1 fps: 8 samples, 4 strong, 2 medium, 2 weak. 5 fps: 36 samples, 13 strong, 11 medium, 11 weak.
judgment: reticle event alignment high; target-position confidence low

dvids_anchor: DVIDS: 02:15-02:17 sensor switches modality and loses track
local_visual_result: Local final frames show modality/field changes and loss of usable track context.
detector_summary: Detector becomes unreliable/partial; one no-detection sample at 136s.
